ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "track" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "previous_hit" INTEGER /* Whether the song was a previous hit */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the song belongs to */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album the song is part of */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the song contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the song (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist performs */,
  "born" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "died" TEXT /* Date of death of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (user/admin/analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song in the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "key_features" TEXT /* Key features of the song (e.g. instruments used) */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the song (e.g. happy, sad) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the song (e.g. party, relaxing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)
